query: SELECT id, status, occasion, influencers, JSON_LENGTH(analysisJson, '$.items') as items_count, JSON_LENGTH(analysisJson, '$.scores') as scores_count, JSON_LENGTH(analysisJson, '$.improvements') as improvements_count, JSON_LENGTH(analysisJson, '$.outfitSuggestions') as outfits_count, JSON_LENGTH(analysisJson, '$.trendSources') as trends_count, JSON_LENGTH(analysisJson, '$.linkedMentions') as mentions_count, JSON_EXTRACT(analysisJson, '$.overallScore') as overall_score FROM reviews ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user RfxnZb4sKQE9yA3.root --database SGdPHKr3xPrRPbHA9C9esB --execute SELECT id, status, occasion, influencers, JSON_LENGTH(analysisJson, '$.items') as items_count, JSON_LENGTH(analysisJson, '$.scores') as scores_count, JSON_LENGTH(analysisJson, '$.improvements') as improvements_count, JSON_LENGTH(analysisJson, '$.outfitSuggestions') as outfits_count, JSON_LENGTH(analysisJson, '$.trendSources') as trends_count, JSON_LENGTH(analysisJson, '$.linkedMentions') as mentions_count, JSON_EXTRACT(analysisJson, '$.overallScore') as overall_score FROM reviews ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5
